ads.author: Brandon Allen Williams
ads.title: Ironmaster Dumbbells w/ Heavy Handle Kit, Add on to 120lb (135lb total) & Stand
ads.description: Great adjustable dumbbells that are essentially indestructible. They are BEASTS. I’m only selling because I have individual dumbbells up to 125lbs. This deal includes the 75lb dumbbell set plus the heavy handle kit, the add on kit that takes it to 120lbs (each dumbbell can go up to 135lbs), plus the Ironmaster stand. If you go their website to purchase right now, you’d pay over $1400 dollars. I’m not in any hurry to sell. I don’t need the space and I don’t need the money urgently so any non-sensical offers will be ignored. If you’re really strong, or planning on getting there 🏻, and you are looking for the most durable adjustable dumbbells on the market, you’ve found them at a really big discount.. ~ 50% off the price and these do not breakdown or wear down over time. You will be able to pass these bad boys down to your grandkids.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988 (Project Cab)
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $275 $225 (or best offer) Step back into the late 80s with this original Capcom Bowling upright arcade cabinet. Released in 1988, this sports title brought the fun of bowling into the arcade scene, complete with competitive play and retro charm. It’s a nostalgic piece for collectors and fans of Capcom’s unique arcade lineup. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Monitor does not currently power on — likely needs new caps. - Nothing comes on at the moment; best to start troubleshooting with the power supply and work your way from there. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic Capcom sports arcade with bowling gameplay. - Upright cabinet design from the golden age of arcades. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $225, or best offer - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: P.O.W. Prisoners of War, Upright Arcade, SNK 1988
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – P.O.W. Prisoners of War (SNK, 1988) Price: $325 Own a piece of late-80s arcade history! This is an original P.O.W. – Prisoners of War upright cabinet from SNK, released in 1988. Known as a classic scrolling fighter / beat ’em up, players battle their way through enemy compounds after escaping captivity. It’s a gritty, action-packed title that helped define the genre and remains a nostalgic favorite for collectors. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Boards need work and likely new caps. - Monitor powers on but the image quality is poor. - Lights come on. - No sound currently. - This is a project cabinet — ideal for restoration enthusiasts. Highlights: - Rare SNK beat ’em up from the golden age of arcades. - Upright cabinet with authentic late-80s design. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Pole Position, Upright Arcade, Atari/Namco 1982
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Pole Position (Atari/Namco, November 1982) Price: $400 Step into racing history with this original Pole Position upright cabinet — one of the most iconic arcade racers ever made. Released in 1982 by Atari/Namco, Pole Position was a groundbreaking driving simulator that set the standard for racing games. It’s widely recognized as one of the Top 50 most historically important video games of all time. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs some love. - Boards need work and likely new caps. - Monitor does not power on. - Lights come on. - No sound currently. - This is a project cabinet — perfect for restoration enthusiasts or collectors. Highlights: - Classic upright racer with simulator-style gameplay. - Rare piece of arcade history from the golden age. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a collection. Important: - Price is negotiable, but only slightly. - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Double Axle, Upright Arcade, Taitio 1990
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Double Axle (Taito, 1990) Price: $375 Bring home a piece of arcade racing history! This is an original Double Axle upright cabinet from Taito (1990). Known for its rugged off-road truck racing gameplay, Double Axle puts players behind the wheel of massive monster trucks, battling through dirt tracks, jumps, and obstacles. It’s a rare find that captures the excitement of 90s arcade culture. Condition: - Cabinet is original and shows its age — it needs some love. - Monitor has been converted to LCD. - Lights power on. - Sound is present. - Game plays and works! Highlights: - Classic Taito racing arcade with unique monster truck gameplay. - LCD conversion makes it easier to maintain. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a collection. - A working cabinet from 1990 — not something you see every day. Important: - Price is negotiable, but only slightly. - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

Released in 1988, this sports arcade brought the fun of bowling into the arcade scene, complete with competitive play and classic retro charm. ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Police Trainer, Upright Arcade, P&P Marketing 1996
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Police Trainer (P&P Marketing, 1996) Price: $425 (Negotiable, but not by much) Test your reflexes and accuracy with this original Police Trainer upright arcade cabinet from 1996. Developed by P&P Marketing, Police Trainer is a fast-paced shooter that puts players through a series of training exercises — from target practice to reaction drills — making it one of the most unique skill-based arcade shooters of the 90s. Condition: - Cabinet is original but needs some love due to age. - Monitor powers on, image is good, but likely needs new caps for long-term reliability. - Lights and sound both work. - Controls function, but the guns need recalibration. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic 90s shooter with training-style gameplay. - Upright cabinet design with dual light guns. - Fully playable — monitor, lights, and sound all working. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $425, negotiable but only slightly. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

In Sonic Pinball Party, you'll experience the excitement of playing a classic pinball game with a twist - you can compete against your friends and family in thrilling mini-games. This bundle is a must-have for any Sonic fan, and with fast shipping and a money-back guarantee, you can trust that you'll receive a quality product.

ads.author: Brodie Pugh
ads.title: Dynamo HS-5 Arcade Control Panel
ads.description: It originally had a street fighter overlay on it that I had to remove due to damage. This will fit a Dynamo HS-5. Look at images to determine your own opinion on condition. It will need new plexiglass if you decide to keep it. It could also use new paint unless you decide to put a new overlay on it. Sandblasting and powder coating is usually what holds best if you have access to those. The joysticks, blue buttons, and start buttons are new. $200 or best offer. It seems a new powder coated panel goes for ~$300 shipped without joysticks or buttons. So do what you will with that when contacting me. I can only confirm that this control panel fits the HS-5. Local pickup in Huntsville or I can meet in public in Huntsville or Madison. Not looking to ship this. Also may be open to trades for working Jamma boards or other arcade stuff.

ads.author: Brodie Pugh
ads.title: Top Racer Arcade Board
ads.description: Untested and assumed not working This is a pole position bootleg board. It is a 3 stack. I believe the top one is the sound board, middle is the cpu bd, and bottom is video bd. The EPROMs on the sound bd have broken and corroded legs. I tried to test a couple that had exposed windows and they did not verify against the good rom. The good thing is the roms are available online for this board and a pdf of the schematic for power and video hookup. The only thing I’ve done is clean it and remove a leaky save battery. The leaky battery caused corrosion on the middle board. As far as I can tell it appears to be complete. I’m unsure if this could be fixed or not, so this is sold as is. It may be good to take chips from. $50 obo. Also open to trades for other arcade boards

ads.author: Dirk Smith Johnson
ads.title: Rare Williams OXO Pinball Machine
ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.

ads.author: Berto Moon
ads.title: Bally Night Rider Pinball
ads.description: This weekend special before it goes to storage on Sunday $650 Bally Night Rider Project? Picked it up a little while ago, started getting parts for it and working on it a little bit. So far I put a new Weebly MPU in it. Worked on the rectifier board a bit, it should be replaced or replace the bridge that is bad (they are the smaller bridges not the normal size ones) we jumped one bridge to the other and got most everything to work for testing. Bought new pop caps, new clear plastic protectors, power supply cap kit, orginal backglass was broken so I got a new translite and glass (glass and translite are to thicker than orginal channels. will need to replace them or get a thinner piece of glass I got 1/4 inch glass) A couple displays where not perfect might be the power supply or connectors also. Moving the displays around got them to work in different locations if I remember correctly. Left flipper coil is burned up, I might have a used one I could toss in. That's where I stopped didn't look at the driver board so test the transistor for it. I put it away for new years and now don't feel like messing with it for a while so checking to see if anyone is interested in it. Lockdown bar is included just wasn't in the Pic. Located in Acworth GA

ads.author: Carl Young
ads.title: Arcade cabinets
ads.description: Several arcade machines in various conditions and functionality- Shoot Away II: seems to boot and function, but could not test fully because the rifles are damaged and do no work, and the screen takes up too much space so consider it not functional the screen is missing the feel for it, but it's light so a few screws could hold that screen up. Lethal Enforcers: pretty much fully working, the only issues is the heavy damage to the cabinet itself, and the player 1 and 2 start buttons are broken and would need replaced, I just didn't get that far yet Sega Turbo OutRun: This one has a removed screen and does not boot at all. There's power too it though and there is visual but it's garbled graphics. Lock-on by data east: This one has a dead screen and does not boot at all with a hardware error 29. Cobra Command (inside an atari cabinet?): Has a dead screen and does not boot at all. There's power too it though. Looking to try to get $500 per cabinet but any reasonable offer would be considered. Looking to sell outrun and the monitor separately

ads.author: AnthonyWayne Stewart-Fuller
ads.title: Fast and Furious" Supercars Arcade Machine - Parts/As-Is
ads.description: Fast and Furious Arcade Cab, in pretty beat-up shape but has some working parts still. Sold as-is, or can be stripped for parts. 32" LCD Monitor Seat in decent shape Recovery CD LED's Internal PC (lights come on but is likely stuck in auto-boot) PSU (Bent up pretty good but all connections are working) Pedals (untested) Steering Wheel (untested) Shift Box (untested) Coin Ops (untested, assumed working) Coin Door (Bent, forced entry) CPU Board (scratches, sagging. Definitely fried) Cab exterior (pretty beat-up overall) Please reach out with offers, on parts or the whole cab! Local pick-up preferred.
